title: Invoice (適格請求書)
description: JSON Schema for Japanese qualified invoices conforming to the 2023-10-01 invoice regulation (適格請求書等保存方式).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version discriminator for forward compatibility.

invoiceNumber.description: Invoice number (請求書番号). Issuer-defined identifier.

issueDate.description: Issue date (取引年月日 / 発行日) in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.

dueDate.description: Payment due date (支払期限) in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.

name.description: Issuer name (適格請求書発行事業者の氏名又は名称).

registrationNumber.description: Qualified invoice issuer registration number (T + 13 桁の登録番号).

name.description: Recipient name (書類の交付を受ける事業者の氏名又は名称).

honorific.description: Honorific suffix (例: 御中 / 様).

items.description: Line items (取引内容). At least one item is required.

unit.description: Unit label (例: 個 / 時間 / 式).

taxRate.description: Tax rate (%) — 0 / 8 (軽減税率) / 10 (標準税率).

isReducedRate.description: Whether this item is subject to the reduced tax rate (軽減税率対象品目). Required to be true when taxRate is 8.

taxSummary.description: Per-rate tax summary (税率ごとに区分した小計と消費税額). Required by 適格請求書 regulation.

fileName.description: Optional PDF save filename template (ファイル名). Tokens like {請求先}, {敬称}, {発行元}, {請求書番号}, {発行日}, {YMD} are substituted at render time. When omitted, falls back to `請求書_{請求書番号}`.

theme.description: Accent color (テーマ). Preset names: blue / red / yellow / orange / purple / black / gray, OR an explicit hex like `#2a4d7a`. Unknown values silently fall back to the default blue.

logo.description: Company logo (ロゴ). Accepts `data:image/png;base64,...` (or jpeg/gif/webp) and `https://...` URLs. Other schemes — including svg+xml — are rejected for safety.

stamp.description: Issuer seal (社印 / 印影). Optional and purely visual — Japanese qualified invoices do not require a stamp by law.

enabled.description: Whether to render the stamp. Defaults to true when the `stamp` object is present.

shape.description: Stamp shape. `auto` infers from text (法人 keywords -> square / individual -> round). `off` is equivalent to `enabled: false`.

text.description: Override text rendered inside the stamp. When omitted, derived from `issuer.name`.

font.description: Font-family for the stamp glyphs. Swap-point for forks that bundle a tensho / kaisho font (default: `MdBusiness Stamp`).

subtotal.description: Tax-exclusive subtotal for this rate bucket.

tax.description: Consumption tax for this rate bucket.
